testimonials.quote: She's an excellent collaborator and has become extremely skilled and consistent at breaking the silos between design and devlopment.
Whenever we ran into limitations with certain React libraries or packages, Yatong always found smart, creative solutions that kept the project moving forward.
Yatong's leadership skills have truly set her apart...she led the UX community of practice, driving process improvements that have positively impacted the entire team.
If you want to be on the best path to success for your application you need Yatong doing the groundwork with the client and expected user base.
